sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3520" key="a)krobatiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρο-βᾰτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n3520.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fit for mounting</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
